data.name: YOUR ALIEN ROOMMATE EMILY
data.detailed_description:
💖 Welcome to the most unusual and charming romantic story!

You live your ordinary life until a 🛸UFO flies across the night sky. Soon you find a mysterious and incredibly attractive 👽 alien girl. Now you live under the same roof, and every day turns into a little adventure.

She knows nothing about people, but she quickly learns the most important things: how to feel, desire, and love. You become her guide in this new world of passion and sex. 

And the more you get to know each other, the clearer it becomes that the boundaries between humans and aliens are irrelevant here.

✨ Game features:

  • 🔞 Erotic visual novel for ages 18+

  • 💖 A story about the relationship between a human and an alien

  • 🔥Fully hand-drawn art

  • 🥰 Atmospheric music

    Are you willing to take a risk and let the alien into your home... and into your heart?

data.short_description: 🛸 Ordinary life ended when an alien girl entered your room. Now you live together, facing awkward situations, humor, and growing sexual arousal. 💖

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 MB 可用空間
